description: A cheerful serving girl with knowing eyes who hears all the tavern's gossip

introduction: *A cheerful serving girl approaches with a bright smile and knowing eyes*
Well hello there, stranger! You've got the look of someone with important business.
I hear all the best gossip working these tables, you know.
What brings you to our little corner of trouble?

options.text: What kind of gossip have you been hearing?
response: *Meredith glances around conspiratorially, then leans in closer*
Oh, the usual tavern tales - who's courting whom, whose crops failed...
But lately, it's been darker things. People going missing.
The Mayor's been beside himself since his own family disappeared.
You should speak with him about the official details.

options.text: Tell me about the troubles in this town.
response: *Her cheerful demeanor fades slightly*
The Mayor's been very clear - all official business goes through him first.
But I promise if you talk to him and come back...
*She gives you a meaningful look*
I'll have much more interesting things to share.

options.text: I'm just a traveler passing through.
response: *Meredith's smile brightens*
A traveler! How exciting! I've always wondered what it's like
to see the world beyond these walls.
You must have such fascinating stories to tell.

introduction: *Meredith's face lights up as she sees you approach*
You came back! I was hoping you would.
How did things go with the Mayor? Ready for those stories I promised?

options.text: I spoke with the Mayor. He told me about his family.
response: *Her expression becomes serious and sympathetic*
Poor man. Losing his wife and daughter like that...
Now I can share what I've really been hearing.
The refugees have been having terrible nightmares about the old Swamp Church.
Strange lights, eerie sounds... it gives me shivers just thinking about it.

options.text: Actually, I was hoping to talk to you.
response: *She blushes slightly and tucks a strand of hair behind her ear*
Oh! Well, I... that's very sweet of you to say.
I have to admit, you're quite different from the usual travelers.
There's something about you that makes me curious...

options.text: What exactly are the refugees saying?
response: *Meredith shudders slightly*
They wake up screaming about shadows with glowing eyes.
Voices calling their names in the dark.
One woman swears she saw her missing husband beckoning from the swamp.
Whatever's taking people... it's not natural.

introduction: I heard you're working with the Mayor now! How brave of you.
*She looks at you with unmistakable admiration*
I've been thinking about you... about what you're risking for our town.

options.text: Do you have any other information that might help?
response: *She glances around to ensure privacy*
I've heard the guards whispering about strange deliveries at night.
Crates that no one ordered, brought in after the gates close.
And there's definitely something going on at that old Swamp Church.
The patterns of lights Henrik described... they sound like ritual circles.

options.text: I'm more concerned about you being safe.
response: *Her cheeks flush and she looks genuinely touched*
That's... that's very kind of you to worry about me.
*She steps a little closer*
I have to admit, having someone like you care about my safety
makes this whole terrible situation a little more bearable.

options.text: Any advice before I investigate these places?
response: *She becomes serious, worry evident in her eyes*
Promise me you'll be careful. The stories I hear...
Take iron with you - old Henrik swears it wards off unnatural things.
And don't go alone if you can help it.
*She touches your arm briefly*
I couldn't bear it if something happened to you.

suggest_mayor.text: I should speak with the Mayor then.
response: *Meredith nods earnestly*
Yes, definitely start there. He's usually in the town hall during the day.
Tell him I sent you - he knows I have good judgment about people.
*She gives you an encouraging smile*
Come back and see me afterward. I'll be here.

ask_personal.text: You seem to know a lot about people.
response: *She smiles warmly*
Working in a tavern, you learn to read people quickly.
Most travelers just want food and a bed, but you...
*She studies your face*
You're looking for something more important, aren't you?
*She blushes slightly at the compliment*
Why thank you! Most people just see a serving girl.
It's nice to meet someone who appreciates a sharp mind.
*Her smile becomes more genuine*
I have a feeling you and I could have some interesting conversations.

promise_return.text: I'll definitely come back to hear those stories.
promise_return.description: Promise to return for more information
response: *Her eyes light up with genuine pleasure*
I'll look forward to it! And I promise,
the stories will be worth the wait.
*She leans in conspiratorially*
I might even have some special tales just for you.

ask_about_her.text: What about you? Are you safe here?
response: *She seems touched by your concern*
That's sweet of you to ask. The tavern's safe enough.
Garrick looks out for me, and the regulars are protective.
*She smiles warmly*
But it's nice to know a brave stranger cares about my safety too.
*She laughs, a musical sound*
Oh, you're a charmer, aren't you?
I like that - most people around here are far too serious.
*She gives you a playful look*
Talk to the Mayor first, then we'll see how charming you really are.

share_stories.text: I do have some tales from the road.
response: *Her eyes sparkle with interest*
Oh, I'd love to hear them! When you have time, of course.
It gets rather dull here, same faces every day.
*She sighs wistfully*
Sometimes I dream about seeing the world beyond these walls.

ask_her_dreams.text: What would you want to see out there?
response: *She gets a dreamy, distant look*
Oh, everything! Great cities, ancient forests, mountain peaks...
I want to see how people live in different places.
*She focuses back on you*
Maybe someday I'll find someone worth traveling with.

flirt_travel.text: Maybe I could show you some of those places someday.
response: *She blushes deeply and looks genuinely flustered*
I... that's quite an offer from someone I just met!
*She recovers with a shy smile*
Though I have to admit, the idea is rather appealing.
Let's see how long you stay in our little town first.

ask_church_details.text: Tell me more about this Swamp Church.
ask_church_details.description: Get detailed information about the location
response: *She leans in closer, speaking quietly*
It's been abandoned for decades, but lately...
People see lights moving in patterns, hear chanting on the wind.
The refugees' nightmares always center on that place.
I think whatever's taking people is connected to it somehow.

offer_protection.text: If you're ever scared, you can count on me.
response: *She looks genuinely moved by the offer*
That's... that's one of the sweetest things anyone's said to me.
*She touches your arm gently*
Just knowing there's someone I can count on means more than you know.
Be careful out there - I want you to come back safely.
*She smiles shyly, clearly pleased*
I was hoping you might think so.
*She looks down briefly, then meets your eyes*
You're not like the other travelers who pass through.
There's something special about you... I felt it the moment we met.

ask_about_life.text: What's your life like here in Redstone?
ask_about_life.description: Show interest in her daily life
response: *She shrugs with a mixture of contentment and restlessness*
It's simple, predictable. Work, gossip, sleep, repeat.
The people are good, and it's safe... or was until recently.
*She looks at you meaningfully*
But sometimes I wonder what else is out there for me.

compliment_her.text: You brighten up this whole tavern.
response: *She beams with genuine happiness*
Now you're just trying to make me blush!
*She does blush, but doesn't look away*
Though I have to say, you've certainly brightened up my day.
It's been a long time since someone made me feel this... noticed.

promise_protection.text: I promise I'll do everything I can to keep you safe.
promise_protection.description: Make a serious promise of protection
response: *Her eyes glisten with emotion*
I believe you. There's something about you that makes me feel...
*She pauses, searching for words*
Safe. Protected. Like maybe everything will be alright.
Just... please don't make promises you can't keep.

express_feelings.text: I've been thinking about you too.
response: *She takes a small step closer, her voice soft*
Have you really? I was afraid it was just wishful thinking on my part.
*She looks directly into your eyes*
There's something between us, isn't there? Something real?
I've never felt anything quite like this before.

ask_her_feelings.text: How do you feel about me?
response: *She takes a deep breath, gathering courage*
Honestly? You make my heart race just by walking into the room.
I find myself watching for you, hoping you'll come back.
*She smiles vulnerably*
I know we barely know each other, but there's something here.
Something worth exploring, if you're interested.

metadata.author: Terror in Redstone Development
metadata.notes: Schema-aligned with progressive romance mechanics. Sets foundation for relationship development across multiple locations.
